name: Royal Doctor
overview: Bua, a medical student from today’s 5G era, is mysteriously swept back to King Rama III's reign – the golden era of Thai traditional medicine. Immediately thrown into an unknown world where she finds allies and rivals, her modern ways inevitably clash with old traditions.

trailers.title: หมอหลวง เริ่ม 21 มีนาคมนี้ | Ch3Thailand
